NVLINK status DTO.

Constructors

NVAPINvLinkStatusDto(uint, uint, List<NVAPINvLinkStatusInfoDto>)

Create an NVLINK status DTO.

public NVAPINvLinkStatusDto(uint version, uint linkMask, List<NVAPINvLinkStatusInfoDto> linkInfo)

Parameters

version uint

Structure version.

linkMask uint

Bitmask of active links.

linkInfo List<NVAPINvLinkStatusInfoDto>

Active link info entries (one per set bit in linkMask, ascending).

Properties

LinkInfo

Active link info entries, one per set bit in LinkMask (ordered by ascending link index). Only links that are active per the bitmask are stored, keeping the list compact.

public List<NVAPINvLinkStatusInfoDto> LinkInfo { get; }

Property Value

List<NVAPINvLinkStatusInfoDto>

LinkMask

NVLINK_GET_STATUS_V2.linkMask — bitmask of active links (bit i = link i is in use).

public uint LinkMask { get; }

Property Value

uint

Version

NVLINK_GET_STATUS_V2.version

public uint Version { get; }

Property Value

uint

CreateDefault()

Create a default (no active links) NVLINK status DTO.

Parameters

obj object

The object to compare with the current instance.

Returns

bool

true if obj and this instance are the same type and represent the same value; otherwise, false.

FromNative(NVLINK_GET_STATUS_V2)

Create a DTO from a native NVLINK status struct. Only entries for bits set in native.linkMask are included in LinkInfo.

public static NVAPINvLinkStatusDto FromNative(NVLINK_GET_STATUS_V2 native)

Parameters

native NVLINK_GET_STATUS_V2

Returns

NVAPINvLinkStatusDto

GetHashCode()

Returns the hash code for this instance.

public override int GetHashCode()

Returns

int

A 32-bit signed integer that is the hash code for this instance.

ToNative()

Convert this DTO back to a native struct. List entries are placed at the native indices corresponding to set bits in LinkMask (ascending order); all other slots are default.

public NVLINK_GET_STATUS_V2 ToNative()

Returns

NVLINK_GET_STATUS_V2
